title: Light Midnight-Craving British Butter Wrap
description: A light and buttery British dish featuring casabe, a whole30-friendly flatbread alternative, combined with roast vegetables to create a midnight-craving meal.

ingredients.name: Roasted Vegetables (e.g. Brussels sprouts, carrots)
ingredients.notes: Choose from a variety of whole roasted vegetables.

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: Use organic or clarified butter for a richer flavor.

instructions: Place the Casabe bread on a baking sheet and drizzle with melted butter. Bake for 2-3 minutes until golden brown.
Meanwhile, arrange the roasted vegetables in a single layer on another baking sheet and roast at 425°F (220°C) for about 15-20 minutes or until tender and slightly caramelized.

To assemble, spread roasted vegetable puree evenly over the Casabe bread, followed by placing the crispy Casabe piece inside to create a wrap-like structure. Top with additional butter to enhance its flavor.
Serve hot as an appetizer or small snack.
